title: Aquakota memorial tribute
body: Memorial tribute held in the Aquakota room. Mother Jane Anne Ferguson, Pepe Apantenco, Kim Shively, Kathryn Taylor, Stephan Herrera, Anton Krueger all participated; performances by David Castillo and Ben Donehower. Coordinated with the release of Castillo's *hardly working* and the premiere of the Meow Wolf Aquakota mini-documentary. Convergence Station gift shop sold a special-edition lemur statue bundled with a digital download of *Neotropical*.
